untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of 'overhead resistance level' and 'repeated failed breakout attempts' which cannot be expressed as single-bar indicator conditions. These require multi-bar pattern recognition and historical resistance detection logic not available in the allowed indicator set. Additionally, specific stop placement and exit targets are marked AUTHOR_SILENT. The performance data references 'last candle closes in middle/lowest third' but lacks clear quantitative thresholds for actionable trading rules.
translation_notes: Attempted to translate using pivot point resistance (r1) and body_pct as proxies for candlestick size/position. Entry conditions approximate: price near resistance (close < r1), short white body (body_pct < 0.5), and closing in middle third (body_pct > 0.33). Exit uses support level (s1) as reversal indicator. Stop loss set conservatively at 3% given author silence on specifics. This is a best-effort approximation; the true pattern requires multi-bar resistance analysis.
